$comment: nodes=modules, edges=[cause,effect] where cause is imported-by effect. ADD invariants by hand.

invariants.INV-1_tenant_isolation: Every memory row carries a user ID; row-level security in the database refuses to return another user's rows, regardless of application-layer query correctness. User ID is taken only from the login token, never from the request body. (threat_model.md T1/T7 — fixes the 0.92 cross-tenant leak measured in the baseline.)
invariants.INV-2_no_secrets_stored: The secrets filter runs before anything is written and blocks API keys/card numbers/credentials; must pass in both directions (real secrets blocked, innocent phrases like 'my key learnings' not blocked). Nothing sensitive reaches the store unfiltered. (threat_model.md T2.)
invariants.INV-4_deletion_is_real: A deleted memory is excluded from all reads instantly and removed from the search index within 60 seconds; reads never return a deleted memory even if the index lags. (threat_model.md T5, C11.)
